hotels.description_en:
Prime Location: Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM in Phnom Penh offers a central setting with Wat Phnom an 18-minute walk away and Vattanac Capital 1.6 km nearby. Riverside Park lies 2.1 km from the hotel, while the Royal Palace is 3 km distant.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a swimming pool with a view, sun terrace, and lush garden. The hotel features a restaurant serving American, Thai, Vietnamese, local, Asian, international, and Cambodian cuisines, alongside a bar. Additional amenities include a coffee shop, outdoor seating area, and indoor play area.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms offer air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and city views. Amenities include balconies, sofas, and free toiletries.

Situato a Phnom Penh, a 1,5 km da Tempio di Wat Phnom, Smile Boutique Hotel by EHM prevede una piscina all'aperto, un parcheggio privato gratuito, un giardino e una terrazza. hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Chaiya Palace Hotel in Phnom Penh offers a 4-star experience with a rooftop swimming pool, spa facilities, fitness centre, sun terrace, and lush garden. Guests enjoy free WiFi, a restaurant, bar, and private check-in and check-out services.
Comfortable Amenities: Rooms feature air-conditioning, balconies with city or river views, private bathrooms, and modern amenities such as minibars and flat-screen TVs. Additional facilities include a hot tub, spa bath, and work desks.
Dining Options: The family-friendly restaurant serves French, American, Thai, Asian, and Cambodian cuisines with vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Breakfast includes local specialities, warm dishes, fresh pastries, and more.

hotels.description_en:
Centrally located in Phnom Penh, Plantation Urban Resort & Spa is situated directly behind the Royal Palace. It features two outdoor swimming pools and guests can enjoy meals at the in-house restaurant or have a drink at the bar. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
It is 1.2 km to Chaktomuk Conference Hall, while Aeon Mall is 3.6 km away. Plantation Urban Resort & Spa is a 10-minute walk from the lively riverfront and Phnom Penhâ€™s entertainment area. Phnom Penh International Airport is 10.3 km from the property. The property offers airport transfer services at an additional charge.
The air-conditioned non-smoking rooms also have a fan option. The seating area is fitted with flat-screen TV, minibar and a desk.
